description: Observed persistence/identity evidence from executable probes against a real local Letta Code App Server v2. Captured — not hand-authored — by AppServerRestartReplayProbe; regenerate with :appserver-cli:test when OPENROUTER_API_KEY + a local letta-code install are present.

durability.transcript_store: conversations/<base64 conversation id>/messages.jsonl (append-only; user/assistant linked by parentId chain)

client_message_id.scope: per-message, client-owned; the only durable client-supplied correlation id on the committed transcript

run_id.scope: per-process monotonic counter (observed local-run-1 reused after restart)

event_seq.scope: per-connection generation (new stream connection restarts near seq 2)

mid_turn_kill_before_terminal.note: the user input commits to the transcript before the assistant turn completes; the assistant response is lost if the process is killed before its terminal stop_reason

ambiguity.distinguisher: inspect the committed transcript for a user message whose otid equals the client_message_id
ambiguity.resend_same_client_message_id_after_rest: duplicates the user message and re-runs the turn (observed cmid count = 2); the server does NOT deduplicate by client_message_id

reconciliation_rules.reconcile: before resending, match the committed transcript by otid == client_message_id; only resend if absent

reconciliation_rules.action: if a committed user message has no following assistant/terminal message, re-drive the assistant turn; do NOT re-append the user message
